_comment: Pterodactyl Egg configuration cho Harvest & Hearth API Node.js - sử dụng file .env
name: Harvest & Hearth API (Node.js + .env)
description: Node.js REST API cho Harvest & Hearth app với MongoDB + Clerk Auth. Sử dụng file .env cho cấu hình.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
apt-get update -y
apt-get install -y curl git

if [ ! -d "/home/container" ]; then
    mkdir /home/container
fi

cd /home/container

# Tạo file .env từ .env.example nếu chưa có
if [ ! -f ".env" ] && [ -f ".env.example" ]; then
    cp .env.example .env
    echo ".env file created from .env.example"
elif [ ! -f ".env" ]; then
    echo "Creating .env file..."
    cat > .env << 'EOF'
PORT=25165
SERVER_PORT=25165
NODE_ENV=production
MONGODB_URI=mongodb+srv://USER:PASSWORD@cluster0.xxxxx.mongodb.net/harvest_hearth?retryWrites=true&w=majority
CLERK_SECRET_KEY=sk_test_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx
EOF
fi

echo "Installing dependencies..."
npm install

echo "Installation complete!"
echo ""
echo "IMPORTANT: Edit .env file with your actual values before starting the server!"
echo ""
echo "Required values in .env:"
echo "  - PORT (default: 25165)"
echo "  - SERVER_PORT (default: 25165)"
echo "  - NODE_ENV (default: production)"
echo "  - MONGODB_URI (MongoDB Atlas connection string)"
echo "  - CLERK_SECRET_KEY (Clerk Secret Key)"
echo ""
